name: The Ivy Brasserie Guildford
short_summary: A glamorous all-day brasserie in the heart of Guildford with a menu spanning brunch to late-night cocktails.
long_description: The Ivy Brasserie brings its signature theatrical style to Guildford with marble floors, warm lighting and an encyclopaedic menu that caters for every occasion.
why_we_like_it: The Ivy reliably delivers a special-occasion atmosphere without requiring a trip to London — great for birthdays and anniversaries.
